expectations.evidence: No overview table. Has Dependency Map at the end
Tasks use What/Where/Details format — no narrative Description or Technical decisions block
No acceptance criteria at all — tasks end with implementation details
No Out of Scope sections on any task
Covers JWT service, storage, middleware, dual-mode, endpoints, frontend, mobile, metrics, exchange, runbook, cleanup
Uses Phase/Task numbering (1.1, 2.1) with What/Where/Details format
